🚇 Function-Controlled Subway Maps

Map Controls

1️⃣ Simple Show/Hide - Top Map Container

2️⃣ Switch Maps - Middle Container

3️⃣ Show Multiple Maps Side-by-Side

4️⃣ Toggle Different Zones

📍 Top Map Container

📍 Middle Map Container

📍 Left Side Map

📍 Right Side Map

🗺️ Zone 1 - North Region

🗺️ Zone 2 - Central Region

🗺️ Zone 3 - South Region
